title: Legacy cmsms()->GetDb() instead of cms_utils::get_db()
description: Code uses cmsms()->GetDb() or CmsApp::get_instance()->GetDb() instead of the modern cms_utils::get_db() static accessor. Note: cmsms()->GetDb() is standard and safe in CMSMS 2.2.x; this rule only applies when targeting CMSMS 3.x+.
explanation: cms_utils::get_db() is the modern static accessor for the database connection. The cmsms()->GetDb() chain is verbose but remains standard and safe in CMSMS 2.2.x. Only flag when targeting CMSMS 3.x+.
